c.d: The intuitiveness and simplicity of the app's interface and tools for creating photo effects.
The range and uniqueness of photo effects available, including filters, overlays, and artistic tools.
The ability to adjust and personalize effects to achieve a desired look.
The app's speed, stability, and overall performance when applying effects and editing photos.
The app's pricing model, including free features and subscription costs for premium effects.
c.s: App store pricing, in-app purchase information
